key_finding: Cross-model replication of early decodability on Mistral-7B-v0.3 (analog encoding). KV probes > text: mean K=0.575, V=0.609, text=0.524. V≥K for decodability replicates at ALL layers. Effect weaker than Qwen but consistent. 2 model families now show hidden channel carries answer info beyond text during normal generation.
evidence_impact: Strengthens Phase 2 from moderate to moderate-strong. Cross-model replication on 2 families (Qwen digital, Mistral analog).
next_planned: Experiment C (WRRA) or statistical significance testing for probe differences

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: CROSS-MODEL REPLICATION: KV > text on Qwen (digital) AND Mistral (analog). V≥K decodability at ALL layers both models. Moderate-strong.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families (Qwen, Mistral).
